name: Lullaby Devoured
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the battle starts, gain a {Counter} equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's DEF. After triggering {Death Resistance}, gain up to 2 stacks of "Cradle": all friendly units' shield and HP Recovery increase by [StateArg2]%, removing 1 stack at turn end. If the current realm is {Caro}, after triggering {Death Resistance}, {Embryo Fusion} increases by +[StateArg3]%.
